# Sello Protocol / Aval Newsrooms Demo
# Purpose: The publisher publishes this signal so agents can detect AI-readable rights.
# Narrative: Sello is the Rights Checkout for AI Agents with Proof of Consent.

User-agent: *
Allow: /blog/protected-article
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /tdm-policy.json
Allow: /rsl.txt

Sello-License: sello-voice
Sello-Summary: allowed-with-attribution
Sello-Quote: allowed-with-attribution
Sello-Training: restricted
Sello-Voice: x402-style-payment-required
Sello-Proof: solana:devnet:GW8vQ3sSZkCAVzRfp9xdG7N2UHjHBtNZKRcYwhQAJGbF
Sello-Note: This record is a machine-readable Proof of Consent record for this content hash. 
Sello-Context: Publisher creates the checkout. Agent uses the checkout. Solana keeps the receipt.
